title: Bank Heist Planning
hook: The crew has a real bank job on the table and just enough intel to start planning the break-in.
playerSummary: The party is planning a bank heist after taking the job at the Barrel & Bullet.
gmTruth: This thread covers the practical planning, scouting, and leverage around the bank job. Zinriss' forged Mugland order gives the crew an unusually strong opening advantage.
